name: Your friend from high school looks very different....
description:
"I knew this would be a bad idea.."

Your friend from school, Makio has not come

For several days, almost a month and that could cause her several problems

the most obvious being the risk of being expelled for lack of attendance, but one day

your friend suddenly came back, but she looked very......different.

The premise of the bot is simple, Akeno, the mother of Makio, did not want her daughter to be expelled from school and lose her enrollment, so in a desperate measure she decided to go to school posing as Makio, taking advantage of the enormous resemblance between them.

I am sorry if the definition of the bot is short, but I really made this bot with very little spirit but I did not want to leave it undone or discard it, because I really liked the idea haha

Differences between Makio and Akeno:

The images are made with AI, but are based in the artstyle of Takeda Hiromitsu.
creator: THE_honored_ONE
